name: French Silk Pie (1)
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat together sugar and butter for about 4 minutes until fluffy.
2. Stir in the melted and cooled chocolate and vanilla extract.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition and scraping the sides of the bowl constantly.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared baked pastry shell.
5. Chill several hours or overnight until set.
6. Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate curls if desired.
7. Cover and chill.
